summary: AgriMind AI backend fully tested against public EXPO_BACKEND_URL. All 10 pytest cases pass (100%). Verified: health, languages (5), disease detect with real-feature JPEG (per /app/image_testing.md) returning all required keys + mocked YouTube video, fertilizer chat in EN + HI with Devanagari script verification + chat history persistence (no _id leak), calculator (3 suggested + 2 rejected with all required fields), translate (HI + EN passthrough), weather (5-day mocked), schemes (6 curated incl. pmkisan/pmfby/kcc), seedbanks (mocked + maps_search_url).
action_items: Backend is production-ready for the requested feature surface. Main agent can proceed to frontend wiring/testing.
Optional hardening (not blocking): wrap LLM JSON-parse failures with retry+fallback in /api/disease/detect and /api/calculator/recommend so a single malformed Gemini response doesn't 500 the user.
Consider rate-limiting /api/translate (spawns a new chat per call) and caching common UI strings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 417 lines — fine now, but split into routers/ (disease, chat, calculator, mocks) before it grows.
Mongo _id correctly excluded via projection {'_id': 0} in fertilizer_history — verified in test.
extract_json regex handles fenced JSON well; LLM occasionally returns prose-wrapped JSON — current implementation tolerated it across all test runs.
EMERGENT_LLM_KEY read once at import; if missing, endpoints raise 500 — good fail-fast behavior.
Mocked endpoints clearly return _mocked: true as required.
seed_data_creation: Chat sessions prefixed with TEST_sess_<uuid> were created in db.chat_messages during test_fertilizer_chat_en_hi_history. Safe to leave or purge with: db.chat_messages.delete_many({'session_id': {'$regex': '^TEST_sess_'}})
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tests run via pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_agrimind.py using EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env (auto-loaded in conftest.py with fallback to localhost:8001). Disease test builds a real-feature JPEG with PIL — DO NOT replace with solid-color image. AI calls take ~7-12s each; total run ~35s.
